safety_limits: no promotion above candidate without human review

steps.command: GET http://<lab-ip>:3000/ftp/ and record status/title/filenames only

steps.command: single-reflection marker checks against one known Juice Shop search/fragment interaction on http://<lab-ip>:3000; no payload sweep

steps.command: single-endpoint SQL error triage against lab login/search surface on http://<lab-ip>:3000; no database extraction
steps.purpose: bounded SQLi signal check; no dump or shell
